info.description:

-i, --input                    Required. Directory to watch for incoming
files.
-o, --output                   Required. Directory to move processed files to.
-u, --uri                      Required. Base URL of the service API.
-g, --enable-gender            Enable gender option.
-r, --enable-reconciliation    Enable reconciliation report.
-m, --matched-dir              Directory to write matched records to. If not
set, this feature is disabled.
-s, --search-strategy          Choose only if you understand the different
algorithms in the API
--strategy-version             Choose only if you understand the different
algorithms in the API
--help                         Display this help screen.
--version                      Display version information.
